text:
<%me>さん。
お疲れ様です。
管理官のプリンです。

アークスの更なる強化が必要と
上からお達しがあったため
アークス訓練用施設が作成されました。

一日一回しかチャレンジできませんが
鍛錬に活用してみてください。

では、今後とも
よろしくお願いします。

<%me>,
keep up the good work.
This is Officer Prin.

However, the only Collection Point to teleport to the Rescue Vessel lies
in the innermost part of the area, and the Rescue Vessel can only remain
in the area for a limited amount of time. Reach the Collection Point within
the time limit.

Since your location is blocked from analysis, you cannot check your Quest Info.

You can only take on the challenges once a
day, but please use it to sharpen your skills.

けました。
これにより、キャンプシップは大破し、機能を停止。
かろうじて繋がった通信を受け
救助艦が回収に向かっています。

The Gateway Ship was navigating between planets when
Falspawn suddenly appeared and drove them off course.
The Gateway Ship received heavy damage and was rendered
inoperable. A Rescue Vessel picked up the Gateway Ship's
faint signal and is on its way to collect survivors.

However, the only Collection Point to teleport to the Rescue Vessel lies
in the innermost part of the area, and the Rescue Vessel can only remain
in the area for a limited amount of time. Reach the Collection Point within
the time limit.

Since your location is blocked from analysis, you cannot check your Quest Info.
